source_pr.title: *: support new table reader executor.
source_pr.body:
Support table reader for new plan.

@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: distsql/distsql.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/new_distsql.go, expression/expr_to_pb.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/plan.go, plan/plan_to_pb.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go, plan/stringer.go, plan/task_profile.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/rpc.go
